intent:
Profile 3 CSVs: products (20 rows: product_id, product_name, category, standard_price), stores (10 rows: store_id, store_name, region, city, state), sales_data (186 rows: transaction_id, transaction_date, store_id, product_id, product_name, category, quantity, unit_price, total_amount, customer_segment, payment_method).

Join keys: sales_data.store_id → stores.store_id, sales_data.product_id → products.product_id.
rationale: User submitted files and intent; Supervisor will profile data then generate Bronze STTM.
Supervisor agent will autonomously decide how to profile the raw data and generate Bronze STTM ingestion rules. Bronze is intent-agnostic.
